title: The Locust
description: Docor Nowhere's Creature enter your worlds.. can you survive?
body:
# General Info
The Doctor Nowhere Mod is designed to make you feel like somethings off..
You will notice some weird things looking back at you, or rather the absence of anything looking at you. There are several Events that can happen but I won't spoiler anything

If you are a fan of Horror and/or Doctor Nowhere you should definetly try this out


Main Mods:\
[The Locust](https://modrinth.com/mod/doctor-nowhere)\
[000.jar](https://modrinth.com/mod/000.jar)\
[Goat Man](https://modrinth.com/mod/goatman)

### Settings:
**Falling Trees** is installed, crouch while breaking trees (axe requires) to make cutting down trees easier\
**Ore excavation**, hold your excevate key (default R) to mine chuncks of ores\
**Shaders** are optional
